entry.title: RoboVista leaderboard is online — see how VLMs stack up on real robot tasks 🏆

link.title: RoboVista leaderboard is online — see how VLMs stack up on real robot tasks 🏆

entry.content: The RoboVista leaderboard is now online, tracking how Vision-Language Models perform across diverse real-world robot applications. The benchmark is also available on Hugging Face.
entry.summary: The RoboVista leaderboard is now online, tracking how Vision-Language Models perform across diverse real-world robot applications. The benchmark is also available on Hugging Face.
